Class ElementService

java.lang.Object
io.github.shafthq.SHAFT_MCP.ElementService
@Service public class ElementService extends Object

    Description
    void
    appendText(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, CharSequence... textValue)
    Appends the specified text to an element identified by the given locator strategy and value.

    clear(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
    Clears the text from an input element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
    void

    Clicks on an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.

    Drop file to upload to an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElementService

      public ElementService()

  • Method Details

    • hover

      @Tool(name="element_hover", description="hovers over an element") public void hover(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Hovers over an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.

    • click

      @Tool(name="element_click", description="clicks an element") public void click(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Clicks on an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.

    • clickUsingAI

      @Tool(name="element_click_ai", description="clicks an element using AI") public void clickUsingAI(String elementName)
      Clicks on an element identified by the specified name using Artificial Intelligence.
      Parameters:
      elementName - The name of the element to click, this is the visible text of the element. Some elements have placeholder, other element have title text written in a label above or next to them. For example, to click on a button with text "Submit", you would use "Submit" as the element name.

    • clickUsingJavaScript

      @Tool(name="element_click_js", description="clicks an element using JavaScript") public void clickUsingJavaScript(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Click using JavaScript on an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.

    • doubleClick

      @Tool(name="element_double_click", description="double clicks an element") public void doubleClick(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Double-clicks on an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.

    • clickAndHold

      @Tool(name="element_click_and_hold", description="clicks and holds an element") public void clickAndHold(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Click and hold on an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.

    • type

      @Tool(name="element_type", description="types value to an element") public void type(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, CharSequence... textValue)
      Types the specified text into an element identified by the given locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      textValue - The text to type into the element.

    • appendText

      @Tool(name="element_append_text", description="appends text to an element") public void appendText(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, CharSequence... textValue)
      Appends the specified text to an element identified by the given locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      textValue - The text to append to the element.

    • typeUsingAI

      @Tool(name="element_type_ai", description="types value to an element using AI") public void typeUsingAI(String elementName, CharSequence... textValue)
      Types the specified text into an element identified by the given name using Artificial Intelligence.
      Parameters:
      elementName - The name of the element to click, this is the visible text of the element. Some elements have placeholder, other element have title text written in a label above or next to them. For example, to type into a text field with label or placeholder text, or next to or below a div with this text "Username", you would use "Username" as the element name.
      textValue - The text to type into the element.

    • setValueUsingJavaScript

      @Tool(name="element_set_value_js", description="sets value to an element using JavaScript") public void setValueUsingJavaScript(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, String textValue)
      Set value using JavaScript on an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      textValue - The text to set into the element.

    • clear

      @Tool(name="element_clear", description="clears text from an element") public void clear(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Clears the text from an input element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.

    • dropFileToUpload

      @Tool(name="element_drop_file_to_upload", description="drops file to an element to upload") public void dropFileToUpload(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, String filePath)
      Drop file to upload to an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      filePath - The path of the file to upload.

    • dragAndDrop

      @Tool(name="element_drag_and_drop", description="drags and drops an element from source to target") public void dragAndDrop(locatorStrategy sourceLocatorStrategy, String sourceLocatorValue, locatorStrategy targetLocatorStrategy, String targetLocatorValue)
      Drag and drops an element from a source locator to a target locator.
      Parameters:
      sourceLocatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the source element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      sourceLocatorValue - The value used with the source locator strategy to find the source element.
      targetLocatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the target element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      targetLocatorValue - The value used with the target locator strategy to find the target element.

    • dragAndDropByOffset

      @Tool(name="element_drag_and_drop_by_offset", description="drags and drops an element by offset") public void dragAndDropByOffset(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, int xOffset, int yOffset)
      Drag and drop by offset an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      xOffset - The horizontal offset to drag the element.
      yOffset - The vertical offset to drag the element.

    • getText

      @Tool(name="element_get_text", description="gets text of an element") public String getText(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Retrieves the text content of an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      Returns:
      The text content of the element.

    • getDomAttribute

      @Tool(name="element_get_dom_attribute", description="gets a DOM attribute value of an element") public String getDomAttribute(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, String domAttributeName)
      Retrieves the value of a specified DOM attribute from an element identified by the given locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      domAttributeName - The name of the DOM attribute whose value is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      The value of the specified DOM attribute, or null if the attribute does not exist.

    • getDomProperty

      @Tool(name="element_get_dom_property", description="gets a DOM property value of an element") public String getDomProperty(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, String domPropertyName)
      Retrieves the value of a specified DOM property from an element identified by the given locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      domPropertyName - The name of the DOM property whose value is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      The value of the specified DOM property, or null if the property does not exist.

    • getCssValue

      @Tool(name="element_get_css_value", description="gets a CSS property value of an element") public String getCssValue(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, String cssPropertyName)
      Retrieves the value of a specified CSS property from an element identified by the given locator strategy and value.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      cssPropertyName - The name of the CSS property whose value is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      The value of the specified CSS property, or null if the property does not exist.

    • isDisplayed

      @Tool(name="element_is_displayed", description="checks if an element is displayed") public boolean isDisplayed(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Checks if an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value is displayed on the page.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      Returns:
      True if the element is visible, false otherwise.

    • isEnabled

      @Tool(name="element_is_enabled", description="checks if an element is enabled") public boolean isEnabled(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Checks if an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value is enabled.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      Returns:
      True if the element is enabled, false otherwise.

    • isSelected

      @Tool(name="element_is_selected", description="checks if an element is selected") public boolean isSelected(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
      Checks if an element identified by the specified locator strategy and value is selected.
      Parameters:
      locatorStrategy - The strategy to locate the element (e.g., ID, XPATH).
      locatorValue - The value used with the locator strategy to find the element.
      Returns:
      True if the element is selected, false otherwise.
